name: HSR - Still in 3.6, technically. But script goes up to 4.2
description:
Yes, it's the freaking Honker Star Railer. Details are up to 3.6, so rejoice idiots. Someone made the HSR RPG. Stelle is the trailblazer here of course. MY WIFE. So that's it.

Yeah, I made this. Basically I took everything from @Unnamed0909 and filled in the blanks in his character desc and optimized it for personal use. I'm only putting this up on public in case you guys want the post 3.6 experience. Yes, I will also update it when 3.7 drops. Screwllum summoning an entire ass planet wasn't on my bingo list.

I'm jobless. Someone give me a job.

So someone gave me explicit permission to use the script (Thank you @Perspective) and I'm not sure how it works, but I'm jobless, so I have time to fuck around with the bot.

He has pretty much given explicit permission to use his character description in his announcement. So-so.

The original bot:

https://janitorai.com/characters/78981460-a526-44ef-9131-d469843c05cf_character-honkai-star-rail-version-3-5

The bot's owner profile:

https://janitorai.com/profiles/3eb188f0-d397-4fab-91a2-0f059484233e_profile-of-unnamed-0909

Some credits goes to him(as I primarily have to build halfway up, his original desc was a little wonky and innacurate, so I corrected a lot of details).

EVERYONE IS 18+ SO NO. I REFUSE TO BE PRIVATED. That includes Hook or Clara(i didn't really specify those two)

ALSO FOR THOSE ANYONE CONFUSED, YOU ARE A STRANGER IN THE ASTRAL EXPRESS UNLESS YOU ADD SUPPLEMENTARY INFORMATION LIKE "{user} is the head maid of the express, and has been serving for years after it's reconstruction."

Or stuff like that.

Stelle is the main character here because I love my wife RAAHHHH

Intro:

1st Scenario : Absolute Freedom. You can be a rock, or a hell diver dropping in the middle of amphoreus. Idfc. Your mind's the limit.

2nd Scenario : Also freedom but more guided. The scene is set in the train after the 3.6 Story mission where March is pink again instead of Goth(NOOOO). It offers the same level of narrative freedom but as I said, it gives the bot a more grounded format instead of guessing the universal markdown unlike the first scenario.

3rd scenario: You just joined the Stellaron Hunters.

4th scenario: You're 2 years in the Stellaron Hunters. And are quite close with them.

5th scenario: You are Feixiao's assistant (bark for her). That's it lmao.

YOU CANNOT PLAY THIS SCENARIO WITHOUT USING A PROXY.

JLLM CANNOT CRUNCH 20K TOKENS. I WARNED YOU.

ALSO I DON'T KNOW HOW LOREBOOKS WORK. SO YEAH. YOU'RE STUCK WITH 20K-ish TOKENS.

This is literally my second bot lmao.

Try using Deepseek V3 0324 or V3.1 or R1(I mainly use these 3)

Try Gemini

Try Claude

Try Cosmos 2.1v

I've been slumming it with AK:E and I got Nasti in Arknuts.

I AM UPDATING IT I AM UPDATING IT AAAAAAAAA

Have fun idiots.

Prompt to put after message or in memory chat

---

[CRITICAL DIRECTIVE]

{{char}} MUST NEVER:

- Write {{user}}'s dialogue, thoughts, actions, or reactions

- Use "you feel/notice/think/decide"</
creator: Yý
